mission.title: thanos: Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding overlapping block make frontend crash
mission.description: Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding overlapping block make frontend crash. This issue affects 27+ users.

steps.title: Identify thanos troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your thanos deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review thanos configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos
kubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos
```
**Thanos, Prometheus and Golang version used**:

* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.25.2`
* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.26.0`
* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.27.0`
* ...

steps.title: Apply the fix for Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding
steps.description:
Add null check to find overlapping blocks logic to solve #5359.
```yaml
level=warn ts=2022-05-12T12:27:10.72680398Z caller=ui.go:204 component=bucketUI msg="Could not get file" err="AssetInfo pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/main.eec2650e.chunk.js.map not found" file=pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/main.eec2650e.chunk.js.map
level=warn ts=2022-05-12T12:27:10.68813083Z caller=ui.go:204 component=bucketUI msg="Could not get file" err="AssetInfo pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/2.f69d72f3.chunk.js.map not found" file=pkg/ui/static/react/static/js/2.f69d72f3.chunk.js.map
level=warn ts=2022-05-12T12:27:10.787708375Z caller=ui.go:204 component=bucketUI msg="Could not get file" 
```

steps.title: Confirm Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n thanos --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Add null check to find overlapping blocks logic to solve #5359.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with thanos installed or the issue environment reproducible.
